SELECT 
  CASE WHEN home_score > away_score THEN home_team.name ELSE away_team.name END AS winner,
  COUNT(*) AS wins
FROM games

JOIN teams AS away_team ON games.away_team_id = away_team.id

  AND ((home_team.name = 'Heilbronner Falken' AND away_team.name = 'Lausitzer Füchse')
       OR (home_team.name = 'Lausitzer Füchse' AND away_team.name = 'Heilbronner Falken'))
GROUP BY winner
ORDER BY wins DESC
LIMIT 1;
